headline: Is Charles River (CRL) Quietly Redefining Its Moat Through Lilly’s AI-Driven TuneLab Collaboration?
summary: In June 2026, Eli Lilly’s Lilly TuneLab announced a collaboration under which Charles River Laboratories will provide standardized nonclinical testing services to AI/ML-enabled biotech companies using the TuneLab drug discovery platform. This collaboration ties Charles River more closely into Lilly’s Catalyze360 ecosystem, potentially deepening its role in data-rich, AI-enhanced preclinical research workflows. We’ll now examine how Charles River’s deeper integration into Lilly’s AI-driven...
